meaning: n.腿筋,腿窝vt.切断腿筋使成跛腿,使残废
examples: "I was a bit gutted, as I strained my hamstring again on Friday, " said Richards.
He felt a slight twinge in his damaged hamstring.
Dooher played in the decider despite having a hamstring problem while O'Neill has a knee injury.
Hamstring injuries of this kind usually take four to five weeks to clear up.
